The pricing seems reasonable, but I need to know if this is actually production-ready before I even consider it. Too many times I've been burned by products that looked great but turned out to be MVP-stage with non-scalable infrastructure.
Good to see some positive reviews, but I'm looking for evidence from other developers who've actually shipped this to production. Testimonials are nice, but I need to see real technical validation.
This setup guide better not require 'specific technical network configurations' or I'm out. I don't have time to become an expert in another complex framework just to get basic functionality working.

The signup form is asking for a lot of information upfront. I'd rather test the actual product first to see if it lives up to the promises before committing to another developer tool that might not deliver.

Finally, clear documentation with actual code examples! This is what I need - straightforward integration steps and honest discussion of requirements. If the setup is really this simple, this could work for our team.
